perturbation.original_text: Key Personnel and Shareholder agree that for a period of one (1) year, Key Personnel and Shareholder shall not (aa) directly or indirectly, solicit or service in any way, on behalf of itself or on behalf of or in conjunction with others, any customers, or prospective customers who have been solicited or serviced by the Company; (bb) directly or indirectly take any action which may induce any customer or divert any business from the Company; or (cc) directly or indirectly, for himself or any enterprise engaged in competition with the Company, solicit for employment or employ any employee who is then employed by the Company or who has been employed by the Company within one (1) year prior to the termination of his employment.
perturbation.changed_text: Key Personnel and Shareholder agree that for a period of one (1) year, Key Personnel and Shareholder shall not (aa) directly or indirectly, solicit or service in any way, on behalf of itself or on behalf of or in conjunction with others, any customers, or prospective customers who have been solicited or serviced by the Company prior to the effective date of this agreement; (bb) directly or indirectly take any action which may induce any customer or divert any business from the Company; or (cc) directly or indirectly, for himself or any enterprise engaged in competition with the Company, solicit for employment or employ any employee who is then employed by the Company or who has been employed by the Company within one (1) year prior to the termination of his employment.
perturbation.explanation: The change in Section 3b restricts customer solicitation to those contacted *prior to the agreement's effective date*, implying that soliciting customers the company gains *during* the year following the agreement is permitted. This in-text contradiction clashes with the broader non-compete spirit expressed in Section 3a and weakens the protection intended. This is an in-text contradiction because Section 3a states that the Seller will not engage in the same business as the Company for one year.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder, jointly and severally, expressly covenant and agree that for a period of one (1) year, Seller will not engage in any business or perform any service, directly or indirectly, in competition with the business of the Company, or have any interest, whether as proprietor, partner, employee, stockholder, principal, agent, consultant, director, officer, or in any other capacity or manner whatsoever, in any enterprise that shall engage in the business of the Company, except through publicly-traded shares of a corporation or mutual fund listed on a major stock exchange.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 3b limits the restriction on soliciting customers to only those solicited *prior* to the agreement's effective date. This directly contradicts the broader non-compete agreement in the Contradicted Text, which states that the Seller will not engage in any business in competition with the Company for one year, regardless of when the customers were solicited. This creates a direct conflict, as the changed text allows for soliciting customers gained *after* the effective date, which directly competes with the Company, violating the Contradicted Text.

perturbation.original_text: The existence of any claim or cause of action of Seller and/or Shareholder against the Company or Purchaser, whether predicated on this Agreement, the SPA or otherwise shall not constitute a defense to the enforcement of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The existence of any material claim or cause of action of Seller and/or Shareholder against the Company or Purchaser, whether predicated on this Agreement, the SPA or otherwise shall not constitute a defense to the enforcement of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By adding the word 'material' before 'claim or cause of action', the clause becomes ambiguous. This creates an in-text contradiction because it is unclear what constitutes a 'material' claim, leaving room for interpretation. It makes the enforcement of the Agreement uncertain when minor disputes arise that could be considered a 'claim'. This in-text contradiction undermines the original intent of ensuring that disputes do not hinder the enforcement of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (i) Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder understand that the provisions of this Agreement contain restrictive covenants and prohibit the disclosure of the Proprietary Property of the Company, agree to the reasonability of said provisions, and do herewith expressly agree and acknowledge that their breach of this Agreement will not be adequately compensated by money damages. Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder acknowledge that the restrictions contained in this Agreement are a reasonable and necessary protection of the legitimate interests of the Company and that any violation of these restrictions would cause substantial irreparable injury to the Company. Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder acknowledge that Purchaser would not have entered into this Agreement without receiving the consideration offered by Seller and Shareholder in binding itself to these restrictions.
perturbation.justification: The addition of 'material' introduces ambiguity regarding what constitutes a claim sufficient to prevent enforcement. This contradicts the contradicted text, which emphasizes that any breach of the agreement by the Seller, Key Personnel, and Shareholder, including violations of restrictive covenants, will not be adequately compensated by money damages and would cause substantial irreparable injury to the Company, implying even minor breaches are significant. The word 'material' creates uncertainty as to whether a minor claim could be considered material enough to be a defense, thus creating a direct conflict with the intention of the contradicted text that any violation would cause injury.

perturbation.original_text: Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder expressly agree that in the event of any suit which may be brought by the Company for any violation of the provisions of this Agreement, any such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement shall entitle the Company to any and/or of the following remedies: (aa) an order in any such suit enjoining Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder from violating said provisions. An order to that effect may be entered at any stage of such litigation, without the requirement to post bond, and any application for such injunction shall be without prejudice to any other right of action which may accrue to the parties by reason of the breach or threatened breach of this Agreement; and (bb) an order in any such suit providing for monetary damages.
perturbation.changed_text: Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder expressly agree that in the event of any suit which may be brought by the Company for any violation of the provisions of this Agreement, any such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement shall entitle the Company to any and/or of the following remedies: (aa) an order in any such suit enjoining Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder from violating said provisions. An order to that effect may be entered at any stage of such litigation, with the requirement to post bond of $10,000, and any application for such injunction shall be without prejudice to any other right of action which may accrue to the parties by reason of the breach or threatened breach of this Agreement; and (bb) an order in any such suit providing for monetary damages.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the wording to *require* a $10,000 bond contradicts the original language, that says 'without the requirement to post bond'. Now it is contradictory.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (ii) Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder expressly agree that in the event of any suit which may be brought by the Company for any violation of the provisions of this Agreement, any such breach or threatened breach of this Agreement shall entitle the Company to any and/or of the following remedies: (aa) an order in any such suit enjoining Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder from violating said provisions. An order to that effect may be entered at any stage of such litigation, with the requirement to post bond of $10,000, and any application for such injunction shall be without prejudice to any other right of action which may accrue to the parties by reason of the breach or threatened breach of this Agreement; and (bb) an order in any such suit providing for monetary damages.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that an order enjoining Seller, Key Personnel and Shareholder from violating the provisions of the agreement could be entered 'without the requirement to post bond'. The changed text states that an order to that effect may be entered at any stage of such litigation, 'with the requirement to post bond of $10,000'. This is a direct contradiction. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, which means the inconsistency is in-text, causing a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of, and shall be binding upon, the parties hereto and their successors and permitted assigns.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of, and shall be binding upon, the parties hereto, but only their direct successors and permitted assigns.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'but only their direct', the clause contradicts the original clause, which had no limitation on the successors and permitted assigns. This affects the entire agreement because it may affect it's legal reach.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of, and shall be binding upon, the parties hereto, but only their direct successors and permitted assigns.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated the agreement is binding upon the parties hereto and their successors and permitted assigns, without limitation. The changed text narrows this scope by adding 'but only their direct successors and permitted assigns', which creates a contradiction. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text, which means that this limitation was added to some places of the agreement, but not everywhere, causing a direct and clear contradiction.
